creator: rbg@gayteenresource.org
text:
After upgrading from a 2 month-old 4.3-STABLE install to 4.4-RC, the scrollwheel on my logitech optical mouse would invoke button-3 when scrolling up in the root window, and when changing scroll direction in galeon.

Fix: 

Reverting rev 1.23.2.4 of src/sys/isa/psm.c fixes the problem
How-To-Repeat: Roll the scrollwheel up and down where ever button-3 would create a menu.
